title: NOVA Protocol
description: Core protocol schema for the NOVA Guardian System v2.2.1. Defines interface contracts (IMemoryCompressor, IRetriever), compliance boundaries, and reusable persona/ritual definitions used by all NOVA instances.

^x-.description: Vendor extension fields (x-prefixed) for custom metadata.

version.description: Semantic version of the NOVA protocol (e.g. '2.2.1').

interfaces.description: Required interface contracts that platform capabilities must implement.

IMemoryCompressor.description: Contract for document encoding/compression (OCR or text-pass).

signature.description: Function signature string for the compressor implementation.
Function signature string for the retriever implementation.

compliance.description: Content compliance boundaries for generated output.

quoteMaxWords.description: Maximum words allowed in any single quoted passage.

persona.description: Persona definition — identity, tone, audience targeting, and safety guardrails.

audience.description: Primary audience segments this persona addresses.

guardrails.description: Hard safety constraints the persona must never violate.

description.description: What the persona does during this phase.
